artifact: Household-payment risk dashboard for SIPO outflows with trend, account-level anomaly table, and regional volume comparison.

charts.title: Monthly Household-Payment Outflow, 1997-1998
filters: EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(trans.date AS DATE)) IN (1997, 1998)

charts.title: Accounts Exceeding Twice 1996 Monthly Household-Payment Average
filters: 1997-1998 monthly payment amount > 2 * account 1996 monthly average

chart_spec.layout_intent: Monthly risk trend on top, exception table and regional exposure bar below.
